agents.healthCommand: fail=0; printf 'sub2api='; code=$(curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8080/health || echo curl_failed); echo "$code"; [ "$code" = "200" ] || fail=1; printf 'cliproxyapi='; code=$(curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8317/management.html || echo curl_failed); echo "$code"; [ "$code" = "200" ] || fail=1; exit $fail
agents.runCommand: printf '%s\n' "model-gateway-edge is a model/API gateway adapter. It does not execute free-form agent tasks yet."
